title: Welfare Programs and Reintegration. The Department shall develop and
content: 15 implement a full-cycle reintegration program specific for seafarers which shall cover the 16 different dimensions of support such as economic, social, psychosocial, gender- 17 responsive, and cultural interventions. 18 19 This reintegration support shall be without prejudice to the program and services of the 20 OWWA under its mandate pursuant to R.A. No. 10801. 21 22 23 Repatriation 24 25
